creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Gea-Suan Lin,
We are making a push to eliminate interactive ports.  p5-NNML hasn't been updated since it was introduced 8 years ago.  Is it still useful?

Our options are:
1) Deprecate and remove the port
2) Convert it to be a regular, non-interactive port
3) do nothing

If you think (3) is the way to go, you need to tell us why it can't be converted (the technical reason) and why it deserves to remain despite being unable to produce binary packages.

Thanks,
John
